VScanCode() - 类 的构造器com.android.device.input.KeyboardManager.VScanCode
 
vScanCode - 类 中的变量com.android.device.input.VScanEntry
 
VScanEntry - com.android.device.input中的类
This class stores a virtual key scan code entry.
VScanEntry(int) - 类 的构造器com.android.device.input.VScanEntry
The VScan code is the physical scan code.
